productDisplayName: Warner Bros Kids Unisex TJ Stud Sandal White Casual Shoes
description: Round toed white and blue shoes with orange accents Mesh upper with synthetic overlays and Tom and Jerry print on the lateral sides of the shoes Central velcro closure and a central lace design Soft padded foot-bed with a haul loop and cut design at the collar and sides Tough textured out-sole with grooves
